scope.summary: Server wallet profiles no longer imply SNI; explicit use_sni still passes through, and README/config docs describe the opt-in SNI contract and rustls ServerName limit.
out_of_scope: real OCI ADB endpoint smoke F4, which remains an operator/live-environment gate
B7b session teardown and logoff verification paths owned by pane 3
repo-wide 0.9.1 to 0.10.0 train rename oraclemcp-788nn, held by operator sequencing

proofs.summary: Wallet-only connect options keep use_sni at the driver default instead of forcing true.
Explicit wallet, DN, and use_sni=false fields still pass through to the driver.

proofs.command: env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo test -p oraclemcp-config --test example_config_parses -- --nocapture
proofs.summary: The updated annotated example config still parses and validates.

proofs.command: env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo test -p oraclemcp-core --test oci_tcps_e2e p2_4_wallet_profile_without_explicit_sni_reaches_local_tcps_terminator -- --nocapture
proofs.summary: The D6 synthetic wallet lane reaches the local TCPS terminator without an explicit use_sni value.

proofs.command: env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo test -p oraclemcp-core --test oci_tcps_e2e token_exec_runs_once_per_physical_tcps_connect_attempt -- --nocapture
proofs.summary: Same-file pre-existing IAM token-exec TCPS addition was verified before committing oci_tcps_e2e.rs by explicit path.
Formatting check passed after the code/test/docs patch.

proofs.command: git diff --check -- README.md docs/configuration.md oraclemcp.example.toml crates/oraclemcp-db/src/connection.rs crates/oraclemcp-core/tests/oci_tcps_e2e.rs
proofs.summary: No whitespace errors in the touched paths.

limitations: Proof is local synthetic TCPS plus scoped unit/config tests; no real ADB endpoint was contacted in this close.
